summary: HandyHub Language & Payment Settings Features - All tests passed. Backend: 16/16 API tests passed for public settings, admin settings CRUD, and validation. Frontend: 16/16 E2E tests passed for Language Settings tab, Payment Methods tab (Stripe/Zelle/Venmo), Push Notifications tab (Firebase), and header Language Selector.

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Missing updateSettings API method - AdvancedSettingsPanel.js called api.updateSettings() but the method did not exist in apiClient.js
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added updateSettings: (data) => apiClient.put('/settings', data) to apiClient.js
bugs_fixed_during_testing.impact: Save Settings button would fail silently without this fix

action_items: Consider adding data-testid attributes to AdvancedSettingsPanel.js, PaymentModal.js, and LanguageContext.js for more robust E2E testing
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin user and test via API updates with cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Language & Payment Settings features tested successfully. AdvancedSettingsPanel has three subtabs: Language, Payments, Push Notifications. The header LanguageSelector dropdown uses a native HTML select element with flag emojis. Payment methods (Stripe/Zelle/Venmo) show/hide configuration fields based on toggle state. Firebase Push Notification fields appear when enabled. Fixed missing updateSettings method in apiClient.js - this was a critical bug.

tests: Default Language selector with EN/ES/UK options
Available Languages toggle buttons with flags
Stripe toggle shows public/secret key fields
Firebase Server Key field with hide/show

language_selector_header.description: Language selector dropdown in dashboard header
tests: Changing language updates selector and localStorage
